mnemonics: HDFS: Hadoop is for Unstructured Data (Scalable)
keyPoints: Data Warehouse: Structured data, SQL queries, optimized for fast reporting
Hadoop: Handles unstructured data, uses MapReduce, batch processing
Use cases: DWH for business intelligence, Hadoop for big data processing
commonMistakes: Assuming Hadoop replaces data warehouses entirely
Using Hadoop for real-time processing instead of batch
